AI.title: Colossal Biosciences said it cloned red wolves. Is it for real?

AI.title: Chinese tech workers are starting to train their AI doubles–and pushing back
AI.summary: Tech workers in China are being instructed by their bosses to train AI agents to replace them—and it’s prompting a wave of soul-searching among otherwise enthusiastic early adopters.  Earlier this month a GitHub project called Colleague Skill, which claimed workers could use it to “distill” their co…

AI.title: Silicon Valley has forgotten what normal people want
AI.summary: One of the most mortifying things about knowing a lot of techies is listening to them tell me excitedly about some very important discovery that they believe they have made. Recently, I ran into an acquaintance of mine, who began talking my ear off about an amazing discovery he'd made with LLMs. Kno…

AI.title: Fortnite developers can make AI characters now — just don’t try to date them
AI.summary: Following last year's AI-powered Darth Vader in Fortnite that swore in a re-creation of James Earl Jones' voice, Epic Games is now letting Fortnite creators experiment with a new "conversations" tool to create AI-powered characters that players can talk and interact with. "Instead of authoring dialo…

AI.title: A Humanoid Robot Set a Half-Marathon Record in China
AI.summary: An autonomous robot from the company Honor ran a half marathon in 50:26, beating the human record by 7 minutes.

AI.title: Prego Has a Dinner-Conversation-Recording Device, Capisce?
AI.summary: The pasta-sauce company has partnered with the nonprofit StoryCorps on a device designed to record family conversations around the table and save them for all time.

AI.title: Tech CEOs Think AI Will Let Them Be Everywhere at Once
AI.summary: Mark Zuckerberg and Jack Dorsey have different visions for how to use AI for management purposes, but both imagine a system of heightened control.

游戏.title: Superman Sequel Man of Tomorrow Filming Begins With New Image from James Gunn
游戏.summary: Superman sequel Man of Tomorrow is officially filming, and DC Studios co-CEO James Gunn has shared a first-look image.

游戏.title: 'Trek Will Resurface': Jonathan Frakes Says Don't Count Out Star Trek Yet
游戏.summary: As the Star Trek franchise enters a period of hiatus with Starfleet Academy's cancellation, Jonathan Frakes discusses the future of Gene Roddenberry's series.

游戏.title: Marvel Studios Reportedly Back for San Diego Comic-Con 2026
游戏.summary: Marvel Studios will return for San Diego Comic-Con 2026. The studio will once again host its SDCC panel in the convention center’s Hall H. The presentation’s focus is expected to be on Avengers: Doomsday.

游戏.title: Holy Moly, Crusader Kings 3 Will Let You Play as a Pope
游戏.summary: Crusader Kings 3 is getting a new core expansion, By God Alone, and it's going to add playable popes to the Paradox strategy game

游戏.title: Tim Cook Stepping Down as Apple CEO in September 2026
游戏.summary: Apple has announced that CEO Tim Cook is stepping down.

游戏.title: Mass Effect TV Showrunner Refutes Claim That Show Got Rewrites for 'Non-Gamers'
游戏.summary: Prime Video Mass Effect TV series co-showrunner Daniel Casey has stepped in to refute a report that suggested the upcoming adaptation had recently undergone rewrites to be “more appealing to non-gamers.”

游戏.title: Take-Two Boss Strauss Zelnick Suggests AI Could Take Elon Musk's Job
游戏.summary: Take-Two's Strauss Zelnick has suggested that Elon Musk might want to watch out for artificial intelligence to take his job after the Tesla boss proposed that Grand Theft Auto 6 could be generated by AI.

游戏.title: Heated Rivalry Showrunner Teases New Source Material for Season 2
游戏.summary: Heated Rivalry show creator, Jacob Tierney, revealed new details for Season 2 of the global hit hockey drama, adapted by author Rachel Reid's Game Changers book series.

游戏.title: Moon Knight Actor Teases Plan for Marvel Midnight Sons Movie
游戏.summary: Moon Knight star Oscar Isaac has teased the possibility that his hooded hero could return as part of a Midnight Sons team-up movie.

游戏.title: Oscar Isaac Comments on Star Wars
游戏.summary: Star Wars actor Oscar Isaac has admitted that his much-memed "Somehow, Palpatine returned" line was the result of last-minute reshoots for Episode 9: The Rise of Skywalker.

游戏.title: David Howard Thornton Engaged
游戏.summary: Terrifier actor David Howard Thornton had fans’ hearts beating over the weekend when he proposed to his girlfriend, Jada Christie, while dressed head to toe as Art the Clown.

游戏.title: Charlize Theron Comments on Timothée Chalamet
游戏.summary: Celebrated actor Charlize Theron has spoken out against Timothée Chalamet’s comments about ballet and opera, calling his words “reckless” and claiming that AI will “replace” him and their peers before it usurps other artistic disciplines like dance.

游戏.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Reveal Timing Announced
游戏.summary: Ubisoft has confirmed when it will officially unveil Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced, via a dedicated showcase later this week.

游戏.title: Roku City Officially Has Its Own Arcade Game
PlayStation Exec Shuhei Yoshida Reveals Why He Was 'Fired'
游戏.summary: Former PlayStation veteran Shuhei Yoshida has said he was "fired" as president of Sony Worldwide Studios after clashing with then-CEO Jim Ryan.

科技.title: Who is John Ternus, the incoming Apple CEO?
科技.summary: Starting on September 1, Ternus will lead one of the world's most valuable companies, but if you're not a dedicated Apple enthusiast, you've probably never heard of this man, who has largely remained out of the spotlight until now.

科技.title: Anthropic takes $5B from Amazon and pledges $100B in cloud spending in return
科技.summary: Amazon has made another circular AI deal: It's investing another $5 billion in Anthropic. Anthropic has agreed to spend $100 billion on AWS in return.

科技.title: Google rolls out Gemini in Chrome in 7 new countries
科技.summary: Google is rolling out Gemini in Chrome in Australia, Indonesia, Japan, the Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, and Vietnam. The company is rolling this feature out to both desktop and iOS in all of these countries except Japan.

科技.title: Tim Cook stepping down as Apple CEO, John Ternus taking over
科技.summary: The transition has been expected for some time and ends one of the longer and more impactful runs a CEO has had at any company. Cook had inherited a company that many industry watchers and enthusiasts struggled to separate from its famed founder. What he leaves behind is a $4 trillion business with …

科技.title: Google Photos adds new touch-up tools for ‘quick’ fixes
科技.summary: You can use the new tools to remove blemishes, refine skin texture, brighten eyes, or whiten teeth in photos.

科技.title: It’s not just one thing — it’s another thing
科技.summary: This sentence construction ("It's not just this — it's that") has become so common in AI-generated writing that it's no longer just a clue that a piece of writing may be synthetic — it's almost a guarantee.

科技.title: North Korean hackers blamed for $290M crypto theft
科技.summary: The hack against Kelp DAO is the largest crypto heist of the year so far.

科技.title: Mastodon says its flagship server was hit by a DDoS attack
科技.summary: The DDoS attack against Mastodon's flagship server comes less than a week after Bluesky was targeted with junk web traffic.

科技.title: FAA orders investigation into Blue Origin’s New Glenn mishap
科技.summary: The New Glenn rocket will have to stay grounded while the company investigates what caused the apparent failure of its upper stage.

科技.title: NSA spies are reportedly using Anthropic’s Mythos, despite Pentagon feud
科技.summary: NSA is said to be using Anthropic's restricted Mythos AI model.

科技.title: WhatsApp is testing a premium subscription, but it is mainly cosmetic
科技.summary: WhatsApp is testing a subscription after Meta debuted a similar subscription for Instagram earlier this year.

科技.title: CEO and CFO suddenly depart AI nuclear power upstart Fermi
科技.summary: The startup, co-founded by former U.S. Energy Secretary Rick Perry, has faced headwinds with its AI campus in Texas.

科技.title: Deezer says 44% of songs uploaded to its platform daily are AI-generated
科技.summary: Deezer says consumption of AI-generated music on the platform is still very low, between 1% and 3% of the total streams, and 85% of these streams are detected as fraudulent and are demonetized.

科技.title: App host Vercel says it was hacked and customer data stolen
科技.summary: Vercel blamed its breach on an earlier hack at Context AI, which allowed hackers to hijack a Vercel employee's account to steal customer data.

科技.title: Rivian’s factory hit by tornado ahead of R2 launch
科技.summary: The tornado hit a newer part of the factory, primarily used for R2 logistics such as deliveries of parts. Rivian has paused operations in the building and expects to start back up sometime this week.

金融市场.summary: Warsh also expressed firm commitment to fighting inflation with only one mention of the labor market.
